column1: # Golden ordering corpus for the Packagist (Composer version_compare / composer/semver) comparator.
# Format: <a> TAB <b> TAB <sign>, where <sign> is cmp(a, b): -1 (a<b), 0 (a==b), 1 (a>b).
# Lines beginning with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# Pins the comparator's agreement with composer/semver. The signs were produced by the
# comparator under test (differentially validated against the real PHP composer/semver over
# 185k pairs) and each row exercises a documented quirk, so a regression fails CI without a
# PHP/Composer toolchain. Extend the random differential with `examples/vercmp.rs`.
# The signature Composer divergence from SemVer: the stability ladder is
#   dev < alpha < beta < RC < stable < patch (-pN)
# i.e. a `-pN` PATCH release sorts ABOVE the plain release, the opposite of a SemVer prerelease.
# a leading 'v' is tolerated and insignificant
# PATCH (-pN) sorts ABOVE the release (Magento-style; opposite of a SemVer prerelease)
# dev sorts below alpha (bottom of the stability ladder)
# beta < RC on the ladder
1.0.0-beta
# stable sorts above RC
1.0.0-stable
# a plain prerelease sorts below the release
1.0.0-alpha
# numeric core is zero-padded, so 1.0 == 1.0.0.0
# core numbers compare numerically
# numbered prereleases of the same stability compare numerically
